data.title: Eli Lilly's weight loss drug falls short with 12.4% average weight loss (27.3 lbs) vs. expected 15%. Competitors incl. Novo Nordisk and smaller firms benefit. ​​​​​​​Potential for a first-in-class weight loss pill by 2026.(MediaType: Benzinga)
data.description: Eli Lilly and Co.'s weight loss competitor Novo Nordisk, along with smaller firms Terns Pharmaceuticals, Viking Therapeutics, and Structure Therapeutics, are seeing increased stock prices following Lilly's release of Phase 3 trial data for orforglipron. The trial showed an average weight loss of 12.4% (27.3 lbs) compared to placebo's 0.9% (2.2 lbs), missing 15% expectations. If launched in 2026, orforglipron could be the first small-molecule weight-loss pill. Analysts noted orforglipron's underperformance compared to Wegovy, with higher discontinuation rates (5.1-10.3% vs. 7.0% for Wegovy, 2.6% for placebo) and potential liabilities such as early plateauing of weight loss and persistent side effects. This creates opportunities for smaller competitors in the weight-loss drug market.

data.title: CPower holds GridFuture 2025 conference addressing load growth through demand response. Awards honor leaders impacting reliability, flexibility, technology, and community progress. Washington, Aug. 7, 2025.
data.description: In Washington on August 7, 2025, the GridFuture 2025 event took place where CPower Energy recognized outstanding leaders in the grid industry. The Customer-Powered Grid® Awards celebrated individuals making significant impacts in reliability, flexibility, technology, and community progress. This annual conference highlights innovations in demand response and distributed energy.

data.title: Global Automotive OEM Telematics Market to exceed 500M connected cars by 2029; 79% new cars had embedded telematics in 2024.
data.description: In Dublin, the "Global Automotive OEM Telematics Market 10th Edition" report is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. The report reveals that major car manufacturers globally have introduced mainstream services in crucial areas. Research indicates that in 2024, around 79% of new vehicles sold globally were fitted with an OEM-embedded telematics system, a rise from 75% in the previous year. The implementation of the eCall mandate in EU27+EFTA+UK has hastened telematics adoption, establishing it as a standard feature in vehicles.

data.title: Saviynt appoints Kevin Spurway as Chief Marketing Officer with over 20 years of experience in enterprise SaaS.
data.description: In Los Angeles today, Saviynt, a key player in AI-driven identity security and governance solutions, revealed the appointment of Kevin Spurway as their new Chief Marketing Officer. With over two decades of experience in high-ranking marketing roles within the enterprise SaaS and software sectors, including serving as CMO for various U.S. companies pre-IPO, private, and public, Spurway’s background is a valuable addition. He comes to Saviynt from Feedzai, a platform focused on AI-based fraud and financial crime prevention. The company expressed enthusiasm in having Kevin join their executive team.

data.title: Nordicus Partners Corp appoints 3 new board members, increasing the board from 3 to 5. Henrik Keller resigns.
data.description: In Beverly Hills, California on August 7, 2025, Nordicus Partners Corporation (OTCQB: NORD), a company focused on accelerating businesses in the life sciences sector from Nordic and U.S. regions to enter the U.S. market, disclosed that Henrik Keller stepped down from the Board of Directors. The Board has expanded from three to five members, with Torben Jensen, Kim T. Mücke, and Andrew J. Ritter being named as replacements to fill the newly created vacancies on the Board.

data.title: Vestis shareholders with losses over $75,000 between May 2, 2024 and May 6, 2025 should contact Faruqi & Faruqi before August 8, 2025 - VSTS.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who have incurred losses exceeding $75,000 in Vestis between May 2, 2024, and May 6, 2025, to reach out to him directly. If you fall into this category, contact him to explore your available options.
